games.title: Stickman Warriors Superhero Fight
games.oneLine: A fast superhero stickman brawler built around dodges, combos, skills, and smart defense.
games.description: Stickman Warriors Superhero Fight delivers fast-paced battles where every dodge, combo, and special move creates an exciting action moment. This game brings together intense combat and hero progression, making it a great choice for fans of stickman fighting games. If you enjoy explosive combat, character upgrades, and fast action, this game delivers the excitement fans expect from Superhero action games and intense battle games.
games.instructions: On PC WASD: Move your character. I/U/O: Skill. K: Defense. J: Attack. L: Displacement. Space: Gathering Strength. On Mobile Click the on-screen button: Operate.

games.title: Neon Drift Circuit
games.oneLine: Slide through bright city curves and chain clean racing lines for high score runs.
games.description: Neon Drift Circuit is a quick racing challenge where smooth turns, clean boosts, and sharp timing turn each lap into a polished arcade sprint.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or WASD to drive. Tap the on-screen steering controls on mobile.

games.title: Cloud Cafe Tiles
games.oneLine: Match soft cafe tiles, clear trays, and build a relaxed puzzle streak.
games.description: Cloud Cafe Tiles blends gentle matching goals with quick rounds, making it easy to play a calm puzzle session between bigger games.
games.instructions: Click or tap matching tiles to clear the board before the tray fills.

games.title: Solar Skate Rush
games.oneLine: Ride rails, collect sparks, and keep your run alive across a sunny arcade course.
games.description: Solar Skate Rush is a score-focused skating game where each jump, grind, and near miss helps build a brighter combo chain.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys to move and Space to jump. Swipe on mobile.

games.title: Bento Battle Tactics
games.oneLine: Place tiny heroes, plan each lane, and win compact tactical battles.
games.description: Bento Battle Tactics turns small maps into clever decisions, asking players to balance placement, upgrades, and timing.
games.instructions: Use the mouse to place units and trigger upgrades between waves.

games.title: Crystal Harbor Quest
games.oneLine: Explore coastal paths, unlock cozy secrets, and collect bright crystal rewards.
games.description: Crystal Harbor Quest is a friendly adventure game with short routes, collectible goals, and a clean browser-friendly flow.
games.instructions: Move with WASD or arrow keys. Use E to interact. Tap highlighted controls on mobile.

games.title: Metro Keyboard Racer
games.oneLine: Type, dodge, and race through a metro course that rewards quick fingers.
games.description: Metro Keyboard Racer mixes racing pressure with typing rhythm, creating a focused PC-first challenge for fast players.
games.instructions: Type the prompted keys to accelerate and use arrow keys to dodge obstacles.

games.title: Turbo Block Arena
games.oneLine: Dash through blocky arenas, grab boosts, and outplay every wave.
games.description: Turbo Block Arena is built for short, energetic browser sessions with readable arenas, quick restarts, and punchy upgrades.
games.instructions: Move with WASD, aim with the mouse, and click to attack. Use touch controls on mobile.

games.title: Pocket Goal Stars
games.oneLine: Take quick shots, bend clean goals, and climb a compact soccer challenge.
games.description: Pocket Goal Stars keeps soccer fast and friendly with simple aiming, short rounds, and satisfying goal effects.
games.instructions: Drag to aim, release to shoot, and time each shot around defenders.

games.title: Cyber Range Lite
games.oneLine: Practice clean aim in compact target rooms with quick restart rounds.
games.description: Cyber Range Lite is a browser shooting trainer for players who want short target runs, crisp feedback, and better aim control.
games.instructions: Move with WASD, aim with the mouse, click to fire, and press R to reload.

games.title: Garden Merge Studio
games.oneLine: Merge garden pieces, unlock calm upgrades, and shape a tidy little studio.
games.description: Garden Merge Studio offers a gentle merge loop where planning space and timing upgrades keeps the board blooming.
games.instructions: Drag matching pieces together to merge them. Tap goals to collect rewards.

games.title: Starline Defense Lab
games.oneLine: Build compact defenses, tune upgrades, and hold the starline wave by wave.
games.description: Starline Defense Lab gives strategy players clear lanes, tight upgrade choices, and a polished defense rhythm.
games.instructions: Place towers with the mouse or tap controls. Upgrade between waves.

games.title: Ocean Dash Arcade
games.oneLine: Zip through water lanes, dodge hazards, and chase a breezy arcade score.
games.description: Ocean Dash Arcade is a colorful quick-play route game with simple controls, short goals, and clean mobile support.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or swipe to switch lanes and collect bright tokens.

games.title: Pixel Ninja Rescue
games.oneLine: Dash through compact stages, rescue allies, and time every jump with clean ninja precision.
games.description: Pixel Ninja Rescue is a quick action platform game built around sharp jumps, readable hazards, and short rescue missions that fit neatly into browser play.
games.instructions: Use WASD or arrow keys to move and jump. Tap the on-screen controls on mobile.

games.title: Rocket Basket Sprint
games.oneLine: Boost down the court, dodge defenders, and land fast arcade basketball shots.
games.description: Rocket Basket Sprint turns basketball into a bright arcade run where quick movement and clean shot timing decide each round.
games.instructions: Move with arrow keys or WASD. Press Space to shoot, or tap the shoot button on mobile.

games.title: Puzzle Bloom Path
games.oneLine: Connect garden paths, open flower gates, and solve calm puzzle boards.
games.description: Puzzle Bloom Path is a relaxed logic game where each path connection opens a gentle board goal and rewards tidy planning.
games.instructions: Click or tap tiles to rotate paths and connect each flower gate.

games.title: Mecha Core Duel
games.oneLine: Pilot a compact mech, chain attacks, and win fast one-on-one arena duels.
games.description: Mecha Core Duel focuses on short browser battles with clear attacks, defensive timing, and upgrade-like momentum between rounds.
games.instructions: Use WASD to move, J to attack, K to guard, and L to dash.

games.title: Skyline Kart Club
games.oneLine: Race rooftop tracks, grab boosts, and keep clean lines across city curves.
games.description: Skyline Kart Club delivers compact kart racing with bright routes, boost pickups, and quick restarts for score chasing.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or WASD to drive. Tap left and right controls on mobile.

games.title: Astro Shield Command
games.oneLine: Manage shield lanes, stop incoming waves, and protect your tiny orbital station.
games.description: Astro Shield Command combines lane defense and shooting pressure, asking players to place shields and react before waves break through.
games.instructions: Click or tap a lane to place shields. Use upgrades between waves to improve defense.
